_comment: Subtitle Configuration File - Edit these values to customize subtitle appearance

highlighted_word._comment: Styling for the currently spoken word (highlighted word)

normal_word._comment: Styling for other words (not currently being spoken)

positioning._comment: Alignment: 1=left, 2=center, 3=right, 4=top-left, 5=top-center, 6=top-right, 7=bottom-left, 8=bottom-center, 9=bottom-right. margin_vertical: higher value = higher up on screen
